cards.afterText: You may place Rocketeer in any space adjacent to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: Juke

cards.afterText:
Choose an effect, or take 1 damage to do both:
• Place Rocketeer in any space in his zone
Or
•Draw 2 cards
cards.title: Barrel roll

cards.basicText:
Move Rocketeer up to 1 space, recover 1 health, and draw 1 card.
You may immediately use an additional action to resolve this effect a second time.
cards.title: More than a patch

cards.afterText: Deal 1 damage to the opposing fighter. Then move Rocketeer up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Clipped

cards.basicText: Move Rocketeer up to 6 spaces and take 1 damage. Then deal 3 damage to an adjacent fighter.
cards.title: Hard Landing

cards.duringText: You may take 1 damage to make this card's value 6 instead.
cards.title: Open Throttle

cards.afterText: You may take 1 damage to deal 2 damage to the attacking fighter.
cards.title: Reckless

cards.basicText:
Draw 2 cards and take 1 damage.
Gain 1 action.
cards.title: Quick Fix

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, draw 2 cards. Otherwise, take 1 damage.
cards.title: Daring strike

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponents card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Regroup

hero.name: Rocketeer
hero.specialAbility: When Rocketeer takes the Maneuver action he may move between spaces in the same zone as if they were adjacent.

ruleCards.content:
One way paths do not limit Rocketeer's movement.

He cannot use secret passages.

Doors block movement across zones.
ruleCards.title: Rocketeer

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote: "It's the closest I'll ever get to heaven, Mr. Hughes."    -Cliff Secord, The Rocketeer.

name: The Rocketeer
note:
Based on the comic and movie character Cliff Secord, the Rocketeer!
Inspired by the invisible Man's movement ability, and with a lose-to-win, reckless flying theme.

V2.1 added Buffy's "Daring Strike" in place of both a "Turn and Burn" and a "From the Sun".
Changed the text on "More than a Patch" to say Immediately, preventing use across turns. Added a note on Doors to the additional rules.

V2.2
*Second part of the hero ability has been removed, it was initially a safety feature, but I think it's worth just playing around it, we'll see.

*Card back added. I found this design on a shirt, it's nice :)

*Juke is now after combat. This means if you attack, and they defend with a mobility card (Skirmish, Dash, Leap Away etc.) you can pursue them, small increase in power, we'll see.

*Barrel Roll overhaul. As the card no longer damages you, the defense value has been decreased. The choice has been swapped for both movement and draw.

*More than a patch. Changed to "Up to 1 space"

*Clipped. New card! Removed one Hard Landing, and added a small attack with a hit and run ability.

*Skirmish replaced with Dash, less power, more movement.

V2.3

* Juke made power 4 instead of 3, needed a bit more of a buff.

* Clipped made a power 1 versatile, basically a Rocketeer twist on counterpunch.

* Regroup removed in favour of extra clipped, turn and burn, and barrel roll, spreading the draw across the deck. 

V2.4 Barrel Roll made similar to original, but with a disengage effect instead.
